item.title: 臺獨22條臺灣人會有感嗎？中共超級大內宣！？Death Threats from the CCP|#我的學習筆記 #532 ‪‪‪‪‪‪‪‪‪@mynotebooks ‬
item.itunes:title: 臺獨22條臺灣人會有感嗎？中共超級大內宣！？Death Threats from the CCP|#我的學習筆記 #532 ‪‪‪‪‪‪‪‪‪@mynotebooks ‬
item.itunes:author: 我的學習筆記
item.itunes:summary:
Hello! Hello everyone! I am Brother Niu. Recently, the Chinese Communist Party issued the. "22 Articles on Taiwan Independence" The Taiwanese independence activists. Maximum death penalty, no retroactive period. These words. As a Taiwanese independence activist, you. Were you scared to death? June 22, 2024. The Supreme People's Court in the Occupied Areas. Supreme People's Procuratorate. Ministry of Public Security, Ministry of State Security,. Ministry of Justice. Jointly hold a press conference. Published the. "Notice on Punishing Taiwan Independence According to Law" Diehards split the country. Opinions on the crime of inciting secession of the country. Then, the 22 Opinions on Taiwan Independence. Forwarded to the fallen area. High People's Courts of various provinces and cities. People's Procuratorate, Public Security Department. National Security Department, Justice Department. Even sent to. Military courts and military procuratorates. of the People's Liberation Army. Request these units. Please implement it carefully. Although I don't know what you think. But in my opinion,. This is just a psychological tactic! Or political propaganda. To intimidate those little pinks. And our fellow victims in the occupied areas. To Taiwan and overseas Chinese. It's basically not harmful. So why do I say that? First, this is an opinion. It is neither a law nor a judicial interpretation. It is not even a normative document. It is just the Communist Party. Just a weathervane for political movements. It tells the whole country. Even the whole world. What we, the Communist Party of China, need to do now. It is to strike at the stubborn elements. among the Taiwanese independence movement. Acts of secession. So will it crack down on Taiwanese independence elements? Well...not really! Because the range is really too broad. At least half of the people in Taiwan. Will be within this strike range. Moreover, there are. Countries that support Taiwan's independence. So it narrows the scope.

It hits. Are they the diehards among the Taiwanese independence movement? Well...not actually! Because this range. At least one-third of Taiwanese. The Democratic Progressive Party and the People's Party. This is too big for the Communist Party. So big that the CCP has no ability to attack. So he narrowed it down further. The targets are Taiwanese independence activists. The diehards inside. There are people who split the country. and incite crimes of splitting the country! If you don't believe it, you can read it carefully. Inside the press conference. The full name of this opinion. On punishing according to law. Taiwan independence diehards. Opinions that split the country or incite the crime. of splitting the country. The main term is to punish crimes according to law. The following modification emphasizes. Those stubborn Taiwanese independence activists. The crimes of secession and sedition. So in fact, Taiwanese independence activists. don’t have to be afraid! There is no need for staunch Taiwanese independence. activists to be afraid! That split the country. Should we be afraid of those who incite the division of the country? Well... Actually, no. Because of this "22 Opinions" All laws used are those under the rule of the Chinese Communist Party. Anti-Secession Law, Criminal Law. With the Civil Procedure Law. The jurisdiction is only. Only the occupied areas, Hong Kong and Macau. Taiwanese in the Free Zone. Or maybe overseas Chinese don’t need to worry at all. Of course you want to die... Spokesperson of the Taiwan Affairs Office of the State Council. Zhu Fenglian at a regular press conference. Scope of the 22 opinions. and provide detailed explanations retrospectively. She stressed that this judicial document is aimed at. A very small number of pro-independence speeches are bad. Taiwan independence diehards who are rampant in their pursuit. of independence. National law enforcement and judicial authorities. Will strictly handle the case according to the law. Precise punishment of crimes. Resolutely defend national sovereignty, unity and territorial integrity. Punitive measures are only aimed at a very small number of. The remarks on separatism are bad. Taiwan independence diehards whose activities are rampant. And the division of the country they implemented.

Inciting secession. They also lured the Taiwanese people by saying. This judicial document is not aimed at the vast majority. of Taiwanese compatriots. We always respect. Caring for and benefiting Taiwan compatriots. Warmly welcome and support our Taiwanese compatriots. Participate in cross-strait exchanges and cooperation in various fields. Sharing the opportunities of China's modernization development. We hope that our Taiwanese compatriots. Resolutely oppose Taiwan independence, secession. and foreign interference. Actively participate in cross-strait exchanges and cooperation. Enjoy the dividends of peaceful development. of cross-strait relations with peace of mind. Next let’s look at. What laws are cited in the 22 Opinions? The first paragraph of the Opinion says. According to the Anti-Secession Law. and the Criminal Law of the People's Republic of China. Criminal Procedure Law of the People's Republic of China. and other laws. and relevant judicial interpretations. This opinion is formulated in light of the actual work situation. Let’s first look at the Anti-Secession Law. Although the 22nd Opinion cited. The name of the Anti-Secession Law. But no specific terms were cited. Because the whole law is a general thing. I don't know how it became law. In a word, it is against Taiwan independence. So I can't quote any specific terms. Let’s look at the Criminal Law again. The 22nd Opinion cited Article 103 of the Criminal Law. The main elements of Taiwan independence,. those who committed serious crimes. Actively participate in the specific delineation. In order to meet the sentencing standards. The corresponding sentence is. Life imprisonment to 10 years, 3 years to 10 years. Finally, less than 3 years. These contents are just repeating the provisions of the criminal law. In addition, the 22nd Opinion also cited the Criminal Law. Article 106, Article 182, Article 291. These three clauses are just some procedural clauses. There's nothing special about it. The name and nature of the. "22 Opinions on Taiwan Independence" There's nothing new. But some of the content in this opinion. All countries have reacted strongly. Because Article 6 of the 22 Opinions. Also, the content described in Article 12. Exceeding the legal limit. The police and state security agencies are investigating. Or after the People's Court accepts the case.

Evading detection or trial. Not subject to statute of limitations. The maximum penalty is life imprisonment and death penalty. On these contents. This has caused strong protests from all countries. Our President Lai Ching-te. At a press conference on June 24, he condemned. I want to emphasize that democracy is not the root of crime. Autocracy is. Insist: China has no right. Punishing Taiwanese people for what they advocate. China has no right to prosecute Taiwanese outside its borders. He also emphasized that. Exchange and dialogue with democratically elected. and legitimate governments. This is the right way to improve the well-being of the people. on both sides of the Taiwan Strait. This is to appeal to the Chinese Communist Party. Dialogue with the DPP government. The U.S. State Department also issued a statement on June 24. Condemn the CCP’s destabilizing words and deeds. State Department spokesman Matthew Miller said. U.S. strongly condemns Chinese officials for escalating tensions. and destabilizing words and deeds. We continue to urge restraint. Do not unilaterally change the status quo. US urges China to engage in meaningful dialogue with Taiwan. Let’s look at this law again. Although the death penalty is not subject to statute of limitations,. It looks scary. But the 22 Opinions. Does such a description have legal effect? As mentioned before. This Opinion is not law. Not a judicial interpretation. It is not a normative document. But this description. Indeed, we can add specific case-handling units. Powers of the police, procuratorate and courts. So for this one. I suggest that the fallen areas. Legal workers and citizens. You can write one. Legality review of regulatory documents (application). Apply for these joint releases from national agencies. Request to revoke the 22-point opinion. Because this description. Exceeds the existing legal requirements. Of course, the Chinese authorities may. Will cite Article 108 of the Criminal Law to refute. Because Article 108 can be sentenced to life imprisonment. But the target. are members of the armed forces, police, militia. This kind of rebellion of the state violence machine. Not applicable to the general public. So, in the words of the "Legality Review of Normative Documents"

The 22 Opinions are likely to be revoked. Of course, before the cancellation. Friends, please do not go to the occupied areas via Yi. Because of past history. Whenever there is a political movement. This political trend document. Under the circumstances of increasing pressure. It will indeed have a huge impact on the occupied areas. Complete zeroing out during the epidemic. Or the modern Anti-Rightist Movement. The Great Leap Forward and the Cultural Revolution. and the subsequent four crackdowns. that swept across mainland China. All of them are from a document that has no legal effect. Or articles or something like that. Maybe because of this. Our government has also raised. Warning signs for traveling to occupied areas. Now it's orange. Just avoid non-essential travel. Brother Niu wants to remind you all here. CCP Laws. In fact, there is no way to govern Taiwan. So 22 comments. It won't be for us in Taiwan. What are the specific impacts? But if you want to deliver it to your door. That’s another matter! Because in the past, the Chinese Communist Party authorities. Inciting national sentiment. The current xenophobic sentiment in the occupied areas. It can only be said that it keeps rising. There have been 2 incidents in the past two weeks. Attacks on foreigners. One happened on June 24th. A male refugee from Suzhou City, Jiangsu Province. The bus that attacked a Japanese school. A Japanese mother who came to pick up her child. Her child was injured. Another female disaster relief worker. I was stabbed because of this. He later died of his injuries. Another case involved four Americans. Teacher at Cornell College. On June 10th. In Jilin City, Jilin Province. Stabbed. Two incidents occurred in the past two weeks. Violence against foreigners. This triggered a wave of foreigners’ concerns. about the occupation of the. Concerns about life safety. I think this is related to the Chinese Communist Party’s. wolf warrior diplomacy. It also has something to do with anti-foreign propaganda. Now China has shared the "22 Opinions on Taiwan Independence"

Using cognitive warfare to transform ethnic hatred. Leading to us Taiwanese. In this concept of Taiwan independence. In the unclear situation. Taiwanese living in occupied areas. And our Taiwanese tourists. And our Taiwanese tourists. Targets of Radical Little Pinks. Although we can discuss here. The 22 Opinions have no legal effect. But our President Lai Ching-te also said. China has no right to prosecute Taiwanese outside its borders. But the 22 Opinions. Inciting ethnic hatred. Still can't be ignored. It is enough to give Taiwanese people in the occupied areas. Or support Taiwan's victims. The result was lethal. This may be the Chinese Communist Party authorities. Reasons for launching the "22 Articles on Taiwan Independence" It is also the government of the Republic of China. Raise the warning for tourists to occupied areas. The reason why it turned orange. It is necessary for the government to raise the warning on tourism. Because in March this year. A fisherman named Hu from Kinmen. And Wu's friend went fishing. Accidentally because of the fog. Drifting to Weitouwan in Quanzhou. Rescued by the Coast Guard in the occupied area. The party originally planned to hold a meeting. on the morning of the 19th. Handing over to two anglers in the middle line of the Jinxia Strait. But the coast guard on the other side. Did not show up at the handover location. until the 23rd. That is 4 days later. Angkor was successfully sent back to Taiwan. But because Hu Ge is in the military. Being detained by the Communist Party due to sensitive identity. This is not an isolated case. According to data released by the Mainland Affairs Council. One year has passed. At least 8. Taiwanese citizens who are veterans of the military or police. After going to the occupied area, he was wrongly detained. Vice Chairman and Spokesperson of the Mainland Affairs Council. Liang Wenjie also said at the press conference. In fact, except for retired military and police officers. General Taiwanese businessmen or religious people. After arriving in the occupied area. I have encountered similar situations before. More familiar to everyone. It should be Li Mengju. In August 2019, he. I lost contact after I arrived in Shenzhen from Hong Kong.

The reason is that his luggage. Some of them say love and peace. Communication card. He was accused by the Chinese Communist Party. of being a Taiwanese spy. Sentenced to 1 year and 10 months. After serving his sentence in 2021. The CCP still won't let him leave the occupied area. Until July 2023. Li Ge was allowed to leave the country. One of the conditions is that you cannot return to Taiwan directly. Finally, after Li Ge went to Japan for a while. Just returned to Taiwan from Japan. Love, peace, communication cards. Will it have any lethality? But we can't use normal thinking. Try to understand the Chinese Communist Party authorities. The Customs in the occupied areas considered. these things very sensitive. Then Brother Li lost his freedom for more than 3 years. So don't think you're okay. Moreover, when entering the occupied areas,. the law will check the mobile phone. Effective July 1. Customs has the right to inspect everyone. There are also mobile phones owned by institutions. Computers and other electronic devices. in this case. Can you guarantee your Facebook. Or on X. Are there any remarks that the CCP finds sensitive or problematic? If you are Taiwanese. Or Winnie the Pooh appears on your phone. Pictures of steamed buns. Then you are likely to. He was detained for endangering national security. The CCP's 22-Point Opinion on Taiwan Independence. The Public Security Bureau on the other side. Will likely strive for performance. Demonstrate professional competence to the top leaders. of the Chinese Communist Party. For Taiwanese businessmen or religious people. and people with political backgrounds. On Facebook, X may also become a target of reconnaissance. At the same time,. the little pinks will also take the opportunity to spread ethnic hatred. Venting out anger on Taiwanese people. So Brother Niu is here. I advise you to think twice before you act. alright! That’s all for today’s 22 Opinions. If you like. Please help us press the subscribe button and share it. If you have capable friends. You can also join our membership. Or click Super Thanks!

In addition, our DC group is now open! Welcome everyone to come in and chat. See you next time for my study notes. ByeBye！

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o-Bf6Xu75yA

話說2024年的6月22日

淪陷區聯合召開一個新聞發佈會

發表《關於依法懲治「臺獨」頑固分子分裂國家煽動分裂國家犯罪的意見》

之後把這個《臺獨22條意見》

轉發給了淪陷區各部門單位

並要求這些單位

請認真貫徹執行

中共發佈的《臺獨22條意見》

對岸的公檢法

很可能會爭取「業績」

向中共高層表現業務能力

對臺商或宗教人士

以及有政治類背景的人進行偵辦

在臉書、X也可能成為偵察目標

同時小粉紅們

也會趁機把民族仇恨

發泄到臺灣人的身上

讓我們一起聊聊 臺獨22條吧！

#台灣 #臺灣 #中國 #中華民國 #中共 #台獨 #臺獨 #台獨22條 #臺獨22條 #習近平 #死刑 #臺獨份子 #台獨份子 #最高人民法院 #最高人民檢察院 #公安部 #國家安全部 #司法部 #共產黨 #政治運動 #臺獨頑固份子 #分裂國家#煽動分裂國家犯罪 #反分裂國家法 #刑法 #刑事訴訟法 #國臺辦 #朱鳳蓮

#民進黨 #賴清德 #美國國務院 #陸委會 #李孟居 #小粉紅 #臺商 #宗教人士

#臉書

📍讓我們繼續活下去 ► http://bit.ly/2tGL3eB

LINE貼圖搜尋「我的學習筆記」或是點下方連結

我的學習筆記2

https://reurl.cc/qkk38y

我的學習筆記3

https://reurl.cc/n77Rn6

我的學習筆記4

https://reurl.cc/mllNq9

🎬更多的學習筆記

YOUTUBE長影片討論 ► https://reurl.cc/gy2ZR

Tiktok上更多短影片 ► https://reurl.cc/bkjjz3

Facebook關注更多消息 ► https://bit.ly/2TFDZXC

Instagram掌握國際大事 ► https://reurl.cc/GyxEp

方格子學術公眾化成果 ► http://bit.ly/32J6mrK

DisCord群組一起聊天抬槓►https://discord.gg/YmSkbSVrUC

小額支付贊助我歐付寶►http://bit.ly/2Z1s1yA

當然還有PayPal►PayPal.Me/wMyNotebook

😉特別感謝6月份支持學習筆記的朋友

Polya Yang、柯誠譽、Rosemary 、阿里不打、Sion Ein、Roots Ko、Wu Pin-Ying、赤炎、懶虎提姆閣、Roy Li、KaHu Lau、葉小雲、李文傑、陳建宏、Louis Tseng、薩麥爾_MLBB、祈翠、Mariposa Bay、語禪、Krib Stek、張輔庭、whiskyhot886 、Chen Chong Lee、Charlie曾、蔡岳峰、Chung-Ming Wang、上善若水、林雋凱

📍特別感謝每位默默支持我們的朋友們，你們給的不只是錢財，更是一段友誼 當你像小蝦米一樣對抗大鯨魚，當你的敵人遠比你想像中強大的時候 發現了這個世界，其實有一群未曾相識卻力挺你的朋友，我想，這就是世界上最美好的感覺了
item.description:
Hello! Hello everyone! I am Brother Niu. Recently, the Chinese Communist Party issued the. "22 Articles on Taiwan Independence" The Taiwanese independence activists. Maximum death penalty, no retroactive period. These words. As a Taiwanese independence activist, you. Were you scared to death? June 22, 2024. The Supreme People's Court in the Occupied Areas. Supreme People's Procuratorate. Ministry of Public Security, Ministry of State Security,. Ministry of Justice. Jointly hold a press conference. Published the. "Notice on Punishing Taiwan Independence According to Law" Diehards split the country. Opinions on the crime of inciting secession of the country. Then, the 22 Opinions on Taiwan Independence. Forwarded to the fallen area. High People's Courts of various provinces and cities. People's Procuratorate, Public Security Department. National Security Department, Justice Department. Even sent to. Military courts and military procuratorates. of the People's Liberation Army. Request these units. Please implement it carefully. Although I don't know what you think. But in my opinion,. This is just a psychological tactic! Or political propaganda. To intimidate those little pinks. And our fellow victims in the occupied areas. To Taiwan and overseas Chinese. It's basically not harmful. So why do I say that? First, this is an opinion. It is neither a law nor a judicial interpretation. It is not even a normative document. It is just the Communist Party. Just a weathervane for political movements. It tells the whole country. Even the whole world. What we, the Communist Party of China, need to do now. It is to strike at the stubborn elements. among the Taiwanese independence movement. Acts of secession. So will it crack down on Taiwanese independence elements? Well...not really! Because the range is really too broad. At least half of the people in Taiwan. Will be within this strike range. Moreover, there are. Countries that support Taiwan's independence. So it narrows the scope.

It hits. Are they the diehards among the Taiwanese independence movement? Well...not actually! Because this range. At least one-third of Taiwanese. The Democratic Progressive Party and the People's Party. This is too big for the Communist Party. So big that the CCP has no ability to attack. So he narrowed it down further. The targets are Taiwanese independence activists. The diehards inside. There are people who split the country. and incite crimes of splitting the country! If you don't believe it, you can read it carefully. Inside the press conference. The full name of this opinion. On punishing according to law. Taiwan independence diehards. Opinions that split the country or incite the crime. of splitting the country. The main term is to punish crimes according to law. The following modification emphasizes. Those stubborn Taiwanese independence activists. The crimes of secession and sedition. So in fact, Taiwanese independence activists. don’t have to be afraid! There is no need for staunch Taiwanese independence. activists to be afraid! That split the country. Should we be afraid of those who incite the division of the country? Well... Actually, no. Because of this "22 Opinions" All laws used are those under the rule of the Chinese Communist Party. Anti-Secession Law, Criminal Law. With the Civil Procedure Law. The jurisdiction is only. Only the occupied areas, Hong Kong and Macau. Taiwanese in the Free Zone. Or maybe overseas Chinese don’t need to worry at all. Of course you want to die... Spokesperson of the Taiwan Affairs Office of the State Council. Zhu Fenglian at a regular press conference. Scope of the 22 opinions. and provide detailed explanations retrospectively. She stressed that this judicial document is aimed at. A very small number of pro-independence speeches are bad. Taiwan independence diehards who are rampant in their pursuit. of independence. National law enforcement and judicial authorities. Will strictly handle the case according to the law. Precise punishment of crimes. Resolutely defend national sovereignty, unity and territorial integrity. Punitive measures are only aimed at a very small number of. The remarks on separatism are bad. Taiwan independence diehards whose activities are rampant. And the division of the country they implemented.

Inciting secession. They also lured the Taiwanese people by saying. This judicial document is not aimed at the vast majority. of Taiwanese compatriots. We always respect. Caring for and benefiting Taiwan compatriots. Warmly welcome and support our Taiwanese compatriots. Participate in cross-strait exchanges and cooperation in various fields. Sharing the opportunities of China's modernization development. We hope that our Taiwanese compatriots. Resolutely oppose Taiwan independence, secession. and foreign interference. Actively participate in cross-strait exchanges and cooperation. Enjoy the dividends of peaceful development. of cross-strait relations with peace of mind. Next let’s look at. What laws are cited in the 22 Opinions? The first paragraph of the Opinion says. According to the Anti-Secession Law. and the Criminal Law of the People's Republic of China. Criminal Procedure Law of the People's Republic of China. and other laws. and relevant judicial interpretations. This opinion is formulated in light of the actual work situation. Let’s first look at the Anti-Secession Law. Although the 22nd Opinion cited. The name of the Anti-Secession Law. But no specific terms were cited. Because the whole law is a general thing. I don't know how it became law. In a word, it is against Taiwan independence. So I can't quote any specific terms. Let’s look at the Criminal Law again. The 22nd Opinion cited Article 103 of the Criminal Law. The main elements of Taiwan independence,. those who committed serious crimes. Actively participate in the specific delineation. In order to meet the sentencing standards. The corresponding sentence is. Life imprisonment to 10 years, 3 years to 10 years. Finally, less than 3 years. These contents are just repeating the provisions of the criminal law. In addition, the 22nd Opinion also cited the Criminal Law. Article 106, Article 182, Article 291. These three clauses are just some procedural clauses. There's nothing special about it. The name and nature of the. "22 Opinions on Taiwan Independence" There's nothing new. But some of the content in this opinion. All countries have reacted strongly. Because Article 6 of the 22 Opinions. Also, the content described in Article 12. Exceeding the legal limit. The police and state security agencies are investigating. Or after the People's Court accepts the case.

Evading detection or trial. Not subject to statute of limitations. The maximum penalty is life imprisonment and death penalty. On these contents. This has caused strong protests from all countries. Our President Lai Ching-te. At a press conference on June 24, he condemned. I want to emphasize that democracy is not the root of crime. Autocracy is. Insist: China has no right. Punishing Taiwanese people for what they advocate. China has no right to prosecute Taiwanese outside its borders. He also emphasized that. Exchange and dialogue with democratically elected. and legitimate governments. This is the right way to improve the well-being of the people. on both sides of the Taiwan Strait. This is to appeal to the Chinese Communist Party. Dialogue with the DPP government. The U.S. State Department also issued a statement on June 24. Condemn the CCP’s destabilizing words and deeds. State Department spokesman Matthew Miller said. U.S. strongly condemns Chinese officials for escalating tensions. and destabilizing words and deeds. We continue to urge restraint. Do not unilaterally change the status quo. US urges China to engage in meaningful dialogue with Taiwan. Let’s look at this law again. Although the death penalty is not subject to statute of limitations,. It looks scary. But the 22 Opinions. Does such a description have legal effect? As mentioned before. This Opinion is not law. Not a judicial interpretation. It is not a normative document. But this description. Indeed, we can add specific case-handling units. Powers of the police, procuratorate and courts. So for this one. I suggest that the fallen areas. Legal workers and citizens. You can write one. Legality review of regulatory documents (application). Apply for these joint releases from national agencies. Request to revoke the 22-point opinion. Because this description. Exceeds the existing legal requirements. Of course, the Chinese authorities may. Will cite Article 108 of the Criminal Law to refute. Because Article 108 can be sentenced to life imprisonment. But the target. are members of the armed forces, police, militia. This kind of rebellion of the state violence machine. Not applicable to the general public. So, in the words of the "Legality Review of Normative Documents"

The 22 Opinions are likely to be revoked. Of course, before the cancellation. Friends, please do not go to the occupied areas via Yi. Because of past history. Whenever there is a political movement. This political trend document. Under the circumstances of increasing pressure. It will indeed have a huge impact on the occupied areas. Complete zeroing out during the epidemic. Or the modern Anti-Rightist Movement. The Great Leap Forward and the Cultural Revolution. and the subsequent four crackdowns. that swept across mainland China. All of them are from a document that has no legal effect. Or articles or something like that. Maybe because of this. Our government has also raised. Warning signs for traveling to occupied areas. Now it's orange. Just avoid non-essential travel. Brother Niu wants to remind you all here. CCP Laws. In fact, there is no way to govern Taiwan. So 22 comments. It won't be for us in Taiwan. What are the specific impacts? But if you want to deliver it to your door. That’s another matter! Because in the past, the Chinese Communist Party authorities. Inciting national sentiment. The current xenophobic sentiment in the occupied areas. It can only be said that it keeps rising. There have been 2 incidents in the past two weeks. Attacks on foreigners. One happened on June 24th. A male refugee from Suzhou City, Jiangsu Province. The bus that attacked a Japanese school. A Japanese mother who came to pick up her child. Her child was injured. Another female disaster relief worker. I was stabbed because of this. He later died of his injuries. Another case involved four Americans. Teacher at Cornell College. On June 10th. In Jilin City, Jilin Province. Stabbed. Two incidents occurred in the past two weeks. Violence against foreigners. This triggered a wave of foreigners’ concerns. about the occupation of the. Concerns about life safety. I think this is related to the Chinese Communist Party’s. wolf warrior diplomacy. It also has something to do with anti-foreign propaganda. Now China has shared the "22 Opinions on Taiwan Independence"

Using cognitive warfare to transform ethnic hatred. Leading to us Taiwanese. In this concept of Taiwan independence. In the unclear situation. Taiwanese living in occupied areas. And our Taiwanese tourists. And our Taiwanese tourists. Targets of Radical Little Pinks. Although we can discuss here. The 22 Opinions have no legal effect. But our President Lai Ching-te also said. China has no right to prosecute Taiwanese outside its borders. But the 22 Opinions. Inciting ethnic hatred. Still can't be ignored. It is enough to give Taiwanese people in the occupied areas. Or support Taiwan's victims. The result was lethal. This may be the Chinese Communist Party authorities. Reasons for launching the "22 Articles on Taiwan Independence" It is also the government of the Republic of China. Raise the warning for tourists to occupied areas. The reason why it turned orange. It is necessary for the government to raise the warning on tourism. Because in March this year. A fisherman named Hu from Kinmen. And Wu's friend went fishing. Accidentally because of the fog. Drifting to Weitouwan in Quanzhou. Rescued by the Coast Guard in the occupied area. The party originally planned to hold a meeting. on the morning of the 19th. Handing over to two anglers in the middle line of the Jinxia Strait. But the coast guard on the other side. Did not show up at the handover location. until the 23rd. That is 4 days later. Angkor was successfully sent back to Taiwan. But because Hu Ge is in the military. Being detained by the Communist Party due to sensitive identity. This is not an isolated case. According to data released by the Mainland Affairs Council. One year has passed. At least 8. Taiwanese citizens who are veterans of the military or police. After going to the occupied area, he was wrongly detained. Vice Chairman and Spokesperson of the Mainland Affairs Council. Liang Wenjie also said at the press conference. In fact, except for retired military and police officers. General Taiwanese businessmen or religious people. After arriving in the occupied area. I have encountered similar situations before. More familiar to everyone. It should be Li Mengju. In August 2019, he. I lost contact after I arrived in Shenzhen from Hong Kong.

The reason is that his luggage. Some of them say love and peace. Communication card. He was accused by the Chinese Communist Party. of being a Taiwanese spy. Sentenced to 1 year and 10 months. After serving his sentence in 2021. The CCP still won't let him leave the occupied area. Until July 2023. Li Ge was allowed to leave the country. One of the conditions is that you cannot return to Taiwan directly. Finally, after Li Ge went to Japan for a while. Just returned to Taiwan from Japan. Love, peace, communication cards. Will it have any lethality? But we can't use normal thinking. Try to understand the Chinese Communist Party authorities. The Customs in the occupied areas considered. these things very sensitive. Then Brother Li lost his freedom for more than 3 years. So don't think you're okay. Moreover, when entering the occupied areas,. the law will check the mobile phone. Effective July 1. Customs has the right to inspect everyone. There are also mobile phones owned by institutions. Computers and other electronic devices. in this case. Can you guarantee your Facebook. Or on X. Are there any remarks that the CCP finds sensitive or problematic? If you are Taiwanese. Or Winnie the Pooh appears on your phone. Pictures of steamed buns. Then you are likely to. He was detained for endangering national security. The CCP's 22-Point Opinion on Taiwan Independence. The Public Security Bureau on the other side. Will likely strive for performance. Demonstrate professional competence to the top leaders. of the Chinese Communist Party. For Taiwanese businessmen or religious people. and people with political backgrounds. On Facebook, X may also become a target of reconnaissance. At the same time,. the little pinks will also take the opportunity to spread ethnic hatred. Venting out anger on Taiwanese people. So Brother Niu is here. I advise you to think twice before you act. alright! That’s all for today’s 22 Opinions. If you like. Please help us press the subscribe button and share it. If you have capable friends. You can also join our membership. Or click Super Thanks!

In addition, our DC group is now open! Welcome everyone to come in and chat. See you next time for my study notes. ByeBye！

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o-Bf6Xu75yA

話說2024年的6月22日

淪陷區聯合召開一個新聞發佈會

發表《關於依法懲治「臺獨」頑固分子分裂國家煽動分裂國家犯罪的意見》

之後把這個《臺獨22條意見》

轉發給了淪陷區各部門單位

並要求這些單位

請認真貫徹執行

中共發佈的《臺獨22條意見》

對岸的公檢法

很可能會爭取「業績」

向中共高層表現業務能力

對臺商或宗教人士

以及有政治類背景的人進行偵辦

在臉書、X也可能成為偵察目標

同時小粉紅們

也會趁機把民族仇恨

發泄到臺灣人的身上

讓我們一起聊聊 臺獨22條吧！

#台灣 #臺灣 #中國 #中華民國 #中共 #台獨 #臺獨 #台獨22條 #臺獨22條 #習近平 #死刑 #臺獨份子 #台獨份子 #最高人民法院 #最高人民檢察院 #公安部 #國家安全部 #司法部 #共產黨 #政治運動 #臺獨頑固份子 #分裂國家#煽動分裂國家犯罪 #反分裂國家法 #刑法 #刑事訴訟法 #國臺辦 #朱鳳蓮

#民進黨 #賴清德 #美國國務院 #陸委會 #李孟居 #小粉紅 #臺商 #宗教人士

#臉書

📍讓我們繼續活下去 ► http://bit.ly/2tGL3eB

LINE貼圖搜尋「我的學習筆記」或是點下方連結

我的學習筆記2

https://reurl.cc/qkk38y

我的學習筆記3

https://reurl.cc/n77Rn6

我的學習筆記4

https://reurl.cc/mllNq9

🎬更多的學習筆記

YOUTUBE長影片討論 ► https://reurl.cc/gy2ZR

Tiktok上更多短影片 ► https://reurl.cc/bkjjz3

Facebook關注更多消息 ► https://bit.ly/2TFDZXC

Instagram掌握國際大事 ► https://reurl.cc/GyxEp

方格子學術公眾化成果 ► http://bit.ly/32J6mrK

DisCord群組一起聊天抬槓►https://discord.gg/YmSkbSVrUC

小額支付贊助我歐付寶►http://bit.ly/2Z1s1yA

當然還有PayPal►PayPal.Me/wMyNotebook

😉特別感謝6月份支持學習筆記的朋友

Polya Yang、柯誠譽、Rosemary 、阿里不打、Sion Ein、Roots Ko、Wu Pin-Ying、赤炎、懶虎提姆閣、Roy Li、KaHu Lau、葉小雲、李文傑、陳建宏、Louis Tseng、薩麥爾_MLBB、祈翠、Mariposa Bay、語禪、Krib Stek、張輔庭、whiskyhot886 、Chen Chong Lee、Charlie曾、蔡岳峰、Chung-Ming Wang、上善若水、林雋凱

📍特別感謝每位默默支持我們的朋友們，你們給的不只是錢財，更是一段友誼 當你像小蝦米一樣對抗大鯨魚，當你的敵人遠比你想像中強大的時候 發現了這個世界，其實有一群未曾相識卻力挺你的朋友，我想，這就是世界上最美好的感覺了
item.content:encoded:
Hello! Hello everyone! I am Brother Niu. Recently, the Chinese Communist Party issued the. "22 Articles on Taiwan Independence" The Taiwanese independence activists. Maximum death penalty, no retroactive period. These words. As a Taiwanese independence activist, you. Were you scared to death? June 22, 2024. The Supreme People's Court in the Occupied Areas. Supreme People's Procuratorate. Ministry of Public Security, Ministry of State Security,. Ministry of Justice. Jointly hold a press conference. Published the. "Notice on Punishing Taiwan Independence According to Law" Diehards split the country. Opinions on the crime of inciting secession of the country. Then, the 22 Opinions on Taiwan Independence. Forwarded to the fallen area. High People's Courts of various provinces and cities. People's Procuratorate, Public Security Department. National Security Department, Justice Department. Even sent to. Military courts and military procuratorates. of the People's Liberation Army. Request these units. Please implement it carefully. Although I don't know what you think. But in my opinion,. This is just a psychological tactic! Or political propaganda. To intimidate those little pinks. And our fellow victims in the occupied areas. To Taiwan and overseas Chinese. It's basically not harmful. So why do I say that? First, this is an opinion. It is neither a law nor a judicial interpretation. It is not even a normative document. It is just the Communist Party. Just a weathervane for political movements. It tells the whole country. Even the whole world. What we, the Communist Party of China, need to do now. It is to strike at the stubborn elements. among the Taiwanese independence movement. Acts of secession. So will it crack down on Taiwanese independence elements? Well...not really! Because the range is really too broad. At least half of the people in Taiwan. Will be within this strike range. Moreover, there are. Countries that support Taiwan's independence. So it narrows the scope.

It hits. Are they the diehards among the Taiwanese independence movement? Well...not actually! Because this range. At least one-third of Taiwanese. The Democratic Progressive Party and the People's Party. This is too big for the Communist Party. So big that the CCP has no ability to attack. So he narrowed it down further. The targets are Taiwanese independence activists. The diehards inside. There are people who split the country. and incite crimes of splitting the country! If you don't believe it, you can read it carefully. Inside the press conference. The full name of this opinion. On punishing according to law. Taiwan independence diehards. Opinions that split the country or incite the crime. of splitting the country. The main term is to punish crimes according to law. The following modification emphasizes. Those stubborn Taiwanese independence activists. The crimes of secession and sedition. So in fact, Taiwanese independence activists. don’t have to be afraid! There is no need for staunch Taiwanese independence. activists to be afraid! That split the country. Should we be afraid of those who incite the division of the country? Well... Actually, no. Because of this "22 Opinions" All laws used are those under the rule of the Chinese Communist Party. Anti-Secession Law, Criminal Law. With the Civil Procedure Law. The jurisdiction is only. Only the occupied areas, Hong Kong and Macau. Taiwanese in the Free Zone. Or maybe overseas Chinese don’t need to worry at all. Of course you want to die... Spokesperson of the Taiwan Affairs Office of the State Council. Zhu Fenglian at a regular press conference. Scope of the 22 opinions. and provide detailed explanations retrospectively. She stressed that this judicial document is aimed at. A very small number of pro-independence speeches are bad. Taiwan independence diehards who are rampant in their pursuit. of independence. National law enforcement and judicial authorities. Will strictly handle the case according to the law. Precise punishment of crimes. Resolutely defend national sovereignty, unity and territorial integrity. Punitive measures are only aimed at a very small number of. The remarks on separatism are bad. Taiwan independence diehards whose activities are rampant. And the division of the country they implemented.

Inciting secession. They also lured the Taiwanese people by saying. This judicial document is not aimed at the vast majority. of Taiwanese compatriots. We always respect. Caring for and benefiting Taiwan compatriots. Warmly welcome and support our Taiwanese compatriots. Participate in cross-strait exchanges and cooperation in various fields. Sharing the opportunities of China's modernization development. We hope that our Taiwanese compatriots. Resolutely oppose Taiwan independence, secession. and foreign interference. Actively participate in cross-strait exchanges and cooperation. Enjoy the dividends of peaceful development. of cross-strait relations with peace of mind. Next let’s look at. What laws are cited in the 22 Opinions? The first paragraph of the Opinion says. According to the Anti-Secession Law. and the Criminal Law of the People's Republic of China. Criminal Procedure Law of the People's Republic of China. and other laws. and relevant judicial interpretations. This opinion is formulated in light of the actual work situation. Let’s first look at the Anti-Secession Law. Although the 22nd Opinion cited. The name of the Anti-Secession Law. But no specific terms were cited. Because the whole law is a general thing. I don't know how it became law. In a word, it is against Taiwan independence. So I can't quote any specific terms. Let’s look at the Criminal Law again. The 22nd Opinion cited Article 103 of the Criminal Law. The main elements of Taiwan independence,. those who committed serious crimes. Actively participate in the specific delineation. In order to meet the sentencing standards. The corresponding sentence is. Life imprisonment to 10 years, 3 years to 10 years. Finally, less than 3 years. These contents are just repeating the provisions of the criminal law. In addition, the 22nd Opinion also cited the Criminal Law. Article 106, Article 182, Article 291. These three clauses are just some procedural clauses. There's nothing special about it. The name and nature of the. "22 Opinions on Taiwan Independence" There's nothing new. But some of the content in this opinion. All countries have reacted strongly. Because Article 6 of the 22 Opinions. Also, the content described in Article 12. Exceeding the legal limit. The police and state security agencies are investigating. Or after the People's Court accepts the case.

Evading detection or trial. Not subject to statute of limitations. The maximum penalty is life imprisonment and death penalty. On these contents. This has caused strong protests from all countries. Our President Lai Ching-te. At a press conference on June 24, he condemned. I want to emphasize that democracy is not the root of crime. Autocracy is. Insist: China has no right. Punishing Taiwanese people for what they advocate. China has no right to prosecute Taiwanese outside its borders. He also emphasized that. Exchange and dialogue with democratically elected. and legitimate governments. This is the right way to improve the well-being of the people. on both sides of the Taiwan Strait. This is to appeal to the Chinese Communist Party. Dialogue with the DPP government. The U.S. State Department also issued a statement on June 24. Condemn the CCP’s destabilizing words and deeds. State Department spokesman Matthew Miller said. U.S. strongly condemns Chinese officials for escalating tensions. and destabilizing words and deeds. We continue to urge restraint. Do not unilaterally change the status quo. US urges China to engage in meaningful dialogue with Taiwan. Let’s look at this law again. Although the death penalty is not subject to statute of limitations,. It looks scary. But the 22 Opinions. Does such a description have legal effect? As mentioned before. This Opinion is not law. Not a judicial interpretation. It is not a normative document. But this description. Indeed, we can add specific case-handling units. Powers of the police, procuratorate and courts. So for this one. I suggest that the fallen areas. Legal workers and citizens. You can write one. Legality review of regulatory documents (application). Apply for these joint releases from national agencies. Request to revoke the 22-point opinion. Because this description. Exceeds the existing legal requirements. Of course, the Chinese authorities may. Will cite Article 108 of the Criminal Law to refute. Because Article 108 can be sentenced to life imprisonment. But the target. are members of the armed forces, police, militia. This kind of rebellion of the state violence machine. Not applicable to the general public. So, in the words of the "Legality Review of Normative Documents"

The 22 Opinions are likely to be revoked. Of course, before the cancellation. Friends, please do not go to the occupied areas via Yi. Because of past history. Whenever there is a political movement. This political trend document. Under the circumstances of increasing pressure. It will indeed have a huge impact on the occupied areas. Complete zeroing out during the epidemic. Or the modern Anti-Rightist Movement. The Great Leap Forward and the Cultural Revolution. and the subsequent four crackdowns. that swept across mainland China. All of them are from a document that has no legal effect. Or articles or something like that. Maybe because of this. Our government has also raised. Warning signs for traveling to occupied areas. Now it's orange. Just avoid non-essential travel. Brother Niu wants to remind you all here. CCP Laws. In fact, there is no way to govern Taiwan. So 22 comments. It won't be for us in Taiwan. What are the specific impacts? But if you want to deliver it to your door. That’s another matter! Because in the past, the Chinese Communist Party authorities. Inciting national sentiment. The current xenophobic sentiment in the occupied areas. It can only be said that it keeps rising. There have been 2 incidents in the past two weeks. Attacks on foreigners. One happened on June 24th. A male refugee from Suzhou City, Jiangsu Province. The bus that attacked a Japanese school. A Japanese mother who came to pick up her child. Her child was injured. Another female disaster relief worker. I was stabbed because of this. He later died of his injuries. Another case involved four Americans. Teacher at Cornell College. On June 10th. In Jilin City, Jilin Province. Stabbed. Two incidents occurred in the past two weeks. Violence against foreigners. This triggered a wave of foreigners’ concerns. about the occupation of the. Concerns about life safety. I think this is related to the Chinese Communist Party’s. wolf warrior diplomacy. It also has something to do with anti-foreign propaganda. Now China has shared the "22 Opinions on Taiwan Independence"

Using cognitive warfare to transform ethnic hatred. Leading to us Taiwanese. In this concept of Taiwan independence. In the unclear situation. Taiwanese living in occupied areas. And our Taiwanese tourists. And our Taiwanese tourists. Targets of Radical Little Pinks. Although we can discuss here. The 22 Opinions have no legal effect. But our President Lai Ching-te also said. China has no right to prosecute Taiwanese outside its borders. But the 22 Opinions. Inciting ethnic hatred. Still can't be ignored. It is enough to give Taiwanese people in the occupied areas. Or support Taiwan's victims. The result was lethal. This may be the Chinese Communist Party authorities. Reasons for launching the "22 Articles on Taiwan Independence" It is also the government of the Republic of China. Raise the warning for tourists to occupied areas. The reason why it turned orange. It is necessary for the government to raise the warning on tourism. Because in March this year. A fisherman named Hu from Kinmen. And Wu's friend went fishing. Accidentally because of the fog. Drifting to Weitouwan in Quanzhou. Rescued by the Coast Guard in the occupied area. The party originally planned to hold a meeting. on the morning of the 19th. Handing over to two anglers in the middle line of the Jinxia Strait. But the coast guard on the other side. Did not show up at the handover location. until the 23rd. That is 4 days later. Angkor was successfully sent back to Taiwan. But because Hu Ge is in the military. Being detained by the Communist Party due to sensitive identity. This is not an isolated case. According to data released by the Mainland Affairs Council. One year has passed. At least 8. Taiwanese citizens who are veterans of the military or police. After going to the occupied area, he was wrongly detained. Vice Chairman and Spokesperson of the Mainland Affairs Council. Liang Wenjie also said at the press conference. In fact, except for retired military and police officers. General Taiwanese businessmen or religious people. After arriving in the occupied area. I have encountered similar situations before. More familiar to everyone. It should be Li Mengju. In August 2019, he. I lost contact after I arrived in Shenzhen from Hong Kong.

The reason is that his luggage. Some of them say love and peace. Communication card. He was accused by the Chinese Communist Party. of being a Taiwanese spy. Sentenced to 1 year and 10 months. After serving his sentence in 2021. The CCP still won't let him leave the occupied area. Until July 2023. Li Ge was allowed to leave the country. One of the conditions is that you cannot return to Taiwan directly. Finally, after Li Ge went to Japan for a while. Just returned to Taiwan from Japan. Love, peace, communication cards. Will it have any lethality? But we can't use normal thinking. Try to understand the Chinese Communist Party authorities. The Customs in the occupied areas considered. these things very sensitive. Then Brother Li lost his freedom for more than 3 years. So don't think you're okay. Moreover, when entering the occupied areas,. the law will check the mobile phone. Effective July 1. Customs has the right to inspect everyone. There are also mobile phones owned by institutions. Computers and other electronic devices. in this case. Can you guarantee your Facebook. Or on X. Are there any remarks that the CCP finds sensitive or problematic? If you are Taiwanese. Or Winnie the Pooh appears on your phone. Pictures of steamed buns. Then you are likely to. He was detained for endangering national security. The CCP's 22-Point Opinion on Taiwan Independence. The Public Security Bureau on the other side. Will likely strive for performance. Demonstrate professional competence to the top leaders. of the Chinese Communist Party. For Taiwanese businessmen or religious people. and people with political backgrounds. On Facebook, X may also become a target of reconnaissance. At the same time,. the little pinks will also take the opportunity to spread ethnic hatred. Venting out anger on Taiwanese people. So Brother Niu is here. I advise you to think twice before you act. alright! That’s all for today’s 22 Opinions. If you like. Please help us press the subscribe button and share it. If you have capable friends. You can also join our membership. Or click Super Thanks!

In addition, our DC group is now open! Welcome everyone to come in and chat. See you next time for my study notes. ByeBye！

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o-Bf6Xu75yA

話說2024年的6月22日

淪陷區聯合召開一個新聞發佈會

發表《關於依法懲治「臺獨」頑固分子分裂國家煽動分裂國家犯罪的意見》

之後把這個《臺獨22條意見》

轉發給了淪陷區各部門單位

並要求這些單位

請認真貫徹執行

中共發佈的《臺獨22條意見》

對岸的公檢法

很可能會爭取「業績」

向中共高層表現業務能力

對臺商或宗教人士

以及有政治類背景的人進行偵辦

在臉書、X也可能成為偵察目標

同時小粉紅們

也會趁機把民族仇恨

發泄到臺灣人的身上

讓我們一起聊聊 臺獨22條吧！

#台灣 #臺灣 #中國 #中華民國 #中共 #台獨 #臺獨 #台獨22條 #臺獨22條 #習近平 #死刑 #臺獨份子 #台獨份子 #最高人民法院 #最高人民檢察院 #公安部 #國家安全部 #司法部 #共產黨 #政治運動 #臺獨頑固份子 #分裂國家#煽動分裂國家犯罪 #反分裂國家法 #刑法 #刑事訴訟法 #國臺辦 #朱鳳蓮

#民進黨 #賴清德 #美國國務院 #陸委會 #李孟居 #小粉紅 #臺商 #宗教人士

#臉書

📍特別感謝每位默默支持我們的朋友們，你們給的不只是錢財，更是一段友誼 當你像小蝦米一樣對抗大鯨魚，當你的敵人遠比你想像中強大的時候 發現了這個世界，其實有一群未曾相識卻力挺你的朋友，我想，這就是世界上最美好的感覺了
